title: Sunken Sailor Origin
description: Adds the custom Sunken Sailor Origin for the Origins mod.
body:
The first release of a small passion project, aiming to realise the experience of an undead pirate through the Origins mod for Minecraft.

///

Features:

You are undead, healing potions harm you, harming potions heal you, and you are immune to poison.

Drowned are passive to you (possible change).

You can "breathe" and toggle nightvision underwater, as well as have innate aqua affinity and depth strider.

Going onto land without water damages you, so watch your step!

///

Explore the depths and reign the seas as the terrifyingly adept Sunken Sailor.
